title: Single-use dispenser, dispenser-arrangement, use of a blow-molded vessel, and use of a single-use dispenser
abstract: The invention relates to a single-use dispenser (1) for supplying a control liquid (L) to an analytical device, the single-use dispenser (1) comprising a blow-molded vessel (2) fluid-tightly delimiting an interior volume (3), and a volume (4) of the control liquid (L), wherein the volume (4) of the control liquid (L) is stored within the interior volume (3), and wherein the blow-molded vessel (2) has a predetermined breaking point (5) adapted to form an outlet aperture (8) for the control liquid (L) by breaking the blow-molded vessel (2) in its predetermined breaking point (5).
claims: Claims Claims 1. Single-use dispenser (1) for supplying a control liquid (L) to an analytical device, the single-use dispenser (1) comprising a blow-molded vessel (2) fluid-tightly delimiting an interior volume (3), and a volume (4) of the control liquid (L), wherein the volume (4) of the control liquid (L) is stored within the interior volume (3), and wherein the blow-molded vessel (2) has a predetermined breaking point (5) adapted to form an outlet aperture (8) for the control liquid (L) by breaking the blow-molded vessel (2) in its predetermined breaking point (5). 2. Single-use dispenser (1) according to claim 1 , characterized in that the volume (4) of the control liquid (L) is a pre-defined volume and is between 50 pl and 5000 pl, in particular between 100 pl and 1000 pl. 3. Single-use dispenser (1) according to any of the preceding claims, characterized in that the interior volume (3) of the blow-molded vessel (2) is a 1-fold to 10-fold, in particular 1.1- fold to 2-fold, of the volume (4) of the control liquid (L). 4. Single-use dispenser (1) according to any of the preceding claims, characterized in that the blow-molded vessel (2) has a constriction (7) defining the predetermined breaking point (5). 5. Single-use dispenser (1) according to any of the preceding claims, characterized in that the outlet aperture (8) has a diameter of 0,5 mm to 5 mm, in particular 1 mm to 2 mm. 6. Dispenser-arrangement (10), comprising at least two single-use dispensers (1 , T) according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the single-use dispensers (1, T) are, in particular pairwise or in a row, connected to one another at a predetermined breaking seam (11) of the dispenser-arrangement (10). 7. Use of a blow-molded vessel (2) for a single-use dispenser (1) according to any of claims 1 to 5, in particular in a dispenser-arrangement (10) according to claim 6. 8. Use of a single-use dispenser (1) according to any of claims 1 to 5, wherein the control liquid (L) is used for accuracy-check and/or calibration of an analytical device.
